nodes.name: .nojekyll
nodes.summary: Empty marker file that disables Jekyll processing on GitHub Pages deployments. Required for sites with directories starting with underscores.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore rules for the understand-anything analysis tool, excluding directories and files that should not be indexed or analyzed.

nodes.name: agent-manifest.yaml (template)
nodes.summary: Template YAML manifest defining the schema and structure for Archon agent definitions, including metadata, capabilities, and tool configurations.

nodes.name: AGENT.md (template)
nodes.summary: Template documentation file for Archon agents, providing instructions and placeholders for documenting agent capabilities, usage, and behavior.

nodes.name: agent-manifest.yaml (context-curator)
nodes.summary: Agent manifest for the Context Curator agent, which compresses and curates context from prior conversation phases to fit within token budgets.

nodes.name: AGENT.md (context-curator)
nodes.summary: Documentation for the Context Curator agent, describing how it summarizes completed phases and manages token window usage for long-running sessions.

nodes.name: agent-manifest.yaml (debugger)
nodes.summary: Agent manifest for the Debugger agent, defining its capabilities for systematic debugging, error analysis, and root cause identification.

nodes.name: AGENT.md (debugger)
nodes.summary: Comprehensive documentation for the Debugger agent, covering error diagnosis workflows, stack trace analysis, and systematic root cause investigation protocols.

nodes.name: agent-manifest.yaml (design)
nodes.summary: Agent manifest for the Design agent, specifying its role in UI/UX design tasks, visual system creation, and design-to-code workflows.

nodes.name: AGENT.md (design)
nodes.summary: Documentation for the Design agent, covering its capabilities in visual design, component systems, and handoff to implementation.

nodes.name: agent-manifest.yaml (dissector)
nodes.summary: Agent manifest for the Dissector agent, defining its deep code analysis and codebase archaeology capabilities.

nodes.name: AGENT.md (dissector)
nodes.summary: Documentation for the Dissector agent, covering its methods for deep codebase analysis, architectural dissection, and dependency mapping.

nodes.name: agent-manifest.yaml (implementer)
nodes.summary: Agent manifest for the Implementer agent, specifying its role in translating plans and specs into working code.

nodes.name: AGENT.md (implementer)
nodes.summary: Documentation for the Implementer agent, covering its approach to executing implementation plans, writing code, and following coding standards.

nodes.name: agent-manifest.yaml (prompt-architect)
nodes.summary: Agent manifest for the Prompt Architect agent, defining its capabilities for designing, refining, and optimizing prompts for LLM workflows.

nodes.name: AGENT.md (prompt-architect)
nodes.summary: Documentation for the Prompt Architect agent, covering prompt design patterns, chain-of-thought construction, and prompt optimization strategies.

nodes.name: agent-manifest.yaml (qa-master)
nodes.summary: Agent manifest for the QA Master agent, defining its capabilities in test strategy, test case generation, and quality assurance workflows.

nodes.name: AGENT.md (qa-master)
nodes.summary: Comprehensive documentation for the QA Master agent, covering test planning, edge case identification, regression testing, and quality gates.

nodes.name: README.md (agents)
nodes.summary: Overview documentation for the agents directory, listing available Archon agents and their primary roles in the framework.

nodes.name: agent-manifest.yaml (reviewer)
nodes.summary: Agent manifest for the Reviewer agent, specifying its code review capabilities including correctness, style, and architectural review.

nodes.name: AGENT.md (reviewer)
nodes.summary: Documentation for the Reviewer agent, covering code review protocols, review criteria, inline comment strategies, and PR review workflows.

nodes.name: agent-manifest.yaml (security-reviewer)
nodes.summary: Agent manifest for the Security Reviewer agent, defining its capabilities for security auditing, vulnerability detection, and OWASP compliance checking.

nodes.name: AGENT.md (security-reviewer)
nodes.summary: Documentation for the Security Reviewer agent, covering its security audit workflow and vulnerability assessment approach.

nodes.name: agent-manifest.yaml (skill-validator)
nodes.summary: Agent manifest for the Skill Validator agent, specifying its role in validating Archon skill manifests and SKILL.md files for compliance.

nodes.name: AGENT.md (skill-validator)
nodes.summary: Documentation for the Skill Validator agent, covering its skill manifest validation workflow, compliance checking, and error reporting.
